privileged_info_summary: The bp_log_analysis task uses synthetic blood pressure data with 36 valid readings collected from 2024-01-15 to 2024-02-02 (~19 days, not the stated 3 weeks). The medical thresholds for categorizing readings align with ACC/AHA 2025 guidelines: Normal (<120/<80), Elevated (120-129/<80), Stage 1 (130-139 or 80-89), Stage 2 (≥140 or ≥90), and Crisis (>180 or >120). The dataset includes realistic imperfections: 2 missing readings, varied time-of-day patterns with 19 morning readings averaging 126.21/80.21 mmHg and 17 evening readings averaging 138.35/88.94 mmHg. The overall averages are 131.94 systolic and 84.33 diastolic. Reading categorization shows 1 normal, 6 elevated, 22 stage 1, 7 stage 2, and 0 crisis readings.
